title: [ESF] Entity Sound Features
description: Allows for entity sound variation using OptiFine format property rules
body: # Entity Sound Features --- [![discord](https://i.imgur.com/vU8pcbf.png)](https://discord.com/invite/rURmwrzUcz) ![-](https://i.imgur.com/yZzzW4Q.pngg) [![curseforge](https://i.imgur.com/rpoyjVG.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/esf-entity-sound-features) ![-](https://i.imgur.com/VgKekoJ.png) [![modrinth](https://i.imgur.com/7fioiRx.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/esf) ![-](https://i.imgur.com/tiNmDIH.png) [![github](https://i.imgur.com/EYNx6oL.png)](https://github.com/Traben-0/entity_sound_features) ![-](https://i.imgur.com/yar5K6v.png) [![kofi](https://i.imgur.com/xdhWKwC.png)](https://ko-fi.com/traben) --- # About ESF is a mod that allows the variation of an entity's sounds based on the ETF / OptiFine .properties format. ESF also adds extra sound related utility to ETF and EMF in the form of sound properties and sound animation functions. # Instructions - For instructions and an example of how to variate existing played sounds see [this guide](https://github.com/Traben-0/entity_sound_features/blob/master/VARIATION.MD) - For instructions on how to use the added sound related utilities for ETF and EMF see [this guide](https://github.com/Traben-0/entity_sound_features/blob/master/UTILITY.MD) --- # Changelog You can find the changelog [here](https://github.com/Traben-0/entity_sound_features/blob/master/CHANGELOG.MD). --- # Need help or have questions? You can reach out on my [Discord](https://discord.com/invite/rURmwrzUcz) (*preferred*) or open an issue on [GitHub](https://github.com/Traben-0/entity_sound_features). --- [![discord](https://i.imgur.com/vU8pcbf.png)](https://discord.com/invite/rURmwrzUcz) ![-](https://i.imgur.com/yZzzW4Q.pngg) [![curseforge](https://i.imgur.com/rpoyjVG.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/esf-entity-sound-features) ![-](https://i.imgur.com/VgKekoJ.png) [![modrinth](https://i.imgur.com/7fioiRx.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/esf) ![-](https://i.imgur.com/tiNmDIH.png) [![github](https://i.imgur.com/EYNx6oL.png)](https://github.com/Traben-0/entity_sound_features) ![-](https://i.imgur.com/yar5K6v.png) [![kofi](https://i.imgur.com/xdhWKwC.png)](https://ko-fi.com/traben) --- ## Hosting Partner deal [![image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/BVzZfTc1/images/bfb592538f8206a6a2d72d19c90714bea91b0e07.png)](https://billing.kinetichosting.com/aff.php?aff=641)
